STATUS_LABELS = {200: "OK", 404: "Not Found", 500: "Server Error"}
MESSAGE_TYPES = {"error": "critical", "warn": "warning", "info": "normal", "debug": "low"}
PRIORITY_WEIGHTS = {"critical": 4, "high": 3, "medium": 2, "low": 1}
CURRENCY_SYMBOLS = {"USD": "$", "EUR": "€", "GBP": "£", "JPY": "¥"}


def get_status_label(code):
    return STATUS_LABELS.get(code, "Unknown")


def classify_message(msg_type):
    return MESSAGE_TYPES.get(msg_type, "unknown")


def get_priority_weight(priority):
    return PRIORITY_WEIGHTS.get(priority, 0)


def build_headers(content_type):
    return {
        "Content-Type": content_type,
        "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
        "X-Request-Id": generate_id(),
    }


def format_currency(amount, currency):
    symbol = CURRENCY_SYMBOLS.get(currency, currency)
    return f"{symbol}{amount:.2f}"
